# Nexus0.5 Completion Roadmap Reference

Source: NEXUS0.5 docs architecture donor file.
Status: adapted reference for fresh nexus planning, not authoritative truth.

## Current Truth Framing
- hardest structural thresholds were previously cleared in donor
- remaining effort was framed as focused finish packs

## Finish Pack Model
Minimum viable done was framed as:
1. generalized integration
2. generalized decomposition and evaluator
3. repair and test automation
4. launch polish and operator UX

Strong commercial done was framed as adding:
5. long-running autonomy and checkpointing
6. capability expansion follow-up

## Use In Fresh Nexus
- used as planning signal only
- all execution must conform to this repo contracts and validations
